title: digitaria eriantha subsp. stolonifera
intro: Digitaria eriantha subsp. stolonifera, also known as Fonio grass, is a type of small grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to West Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Fonio grass include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes, making it a valuable plant in traditional African medicine. Fonio grass can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder for medicinal use, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
